cards.q: What does DBA stand for?
cards.a: Database administrator (DBA) (الصفحة 3)

cards.q: Name one objective related to planning database management.
cards.a: Plan managing database and tools (الصفحة 3)

cards.q: What architecture is listed as an objective for use?
cards.a: Optimal Flexible Architecture (OFA) (الصفحة 3)

cards.q: Which specific software guide is covered in the objectives?
cards.a: User's Guide for: Toad for Oracle (الصفحة 3)

cards.q: What is the first objective listed in the Objectives section?
cards.a: Describe your role as a database administrator (DBA) and explain typical tasks. (الصفحة 6)

cards.q: What is the second objective regarding Oracle Database management?
cards.a: Plan an Oracle Database installation. (الصفحة 6)

cards.q: Which architecture should be used, according to the objectives?
cards.a: Use Optimal Flexible Architecture (OFA). (الصفحة 6)

cards.q: What tool is used for installing Oracle software, as per the objectives?
cards.a: Install the Oracle software by using Oracle Universal Installer (OUI). (الصفحة 6)

cards.q: What is the initial step in designing and implementing an Oracle database?
cards.a: Evaluating the database server hardware (الصفحة 8)

cards.q: Which task involves planning the security and overall structure of a database?
cards.a: Planning the database and security strategy (الصفحة 8)

cards.q: What is the process for protecting data against loss in an Oracle database environment?
cards.a: Backing up the database (الصفحة 8)

cards.q: What ongoing task ensures the smooth operation and efficiency of a maintained Oracle database?
cards.a: Monitoring database performance (الصفحة 8)

cards.q: What is Optimal Flexible Architecture (OFA)?
cards.a: OFA is a file system directory structure that should make maintaining multiple versions of multiple Oracle products straightforward. (الصفحة 12)

cards.q: According to the text, what benefits are gained by following the OFA standard?
cards.a: Security, migrations, and automations are going to be easier to implement because of consistency across the environments. (الصفحة 12)

cards.q: What function does the ORACLE_BASE directory in 19c perform?
cards.a: It provides a way to separate the ORACLE_HOME directories for read-only directories and have the writable files in the ORACLE_BASE. (الصفحة 12)

cards.q: Name some tools used for Oracle database monitoring and management.
cards.a: SQL Developer, TOAD, OEM 19c Cloud Control, Oracle Universal Installer, Database Configuration Assistant, etc. (الصفحة 10)

cards.q: According to the OFA standard, what are the three directories that users should be familiar with?
cards.a: Oracle inventory directory, Oracle base directory (ORACLE_BASE), and Oracle home directory (ORACLE_HOME). (Page 14)

cards.q: What is the name of the directory representing the general location for an Oracle installation?
cards.a: Oracle base directory (ORACLE_BASE). (Page 14)

cards.q: Which directory holds the specific software files for an Oracle product?
cards.a: Oracle home directory (ORACLE_HOME). (Page 14)

cards.q: What is the purpose of the Oracle inventory directory?
cards.a: It tracks the installed components within the OFA standard. (Page 14)

cards.q: What is the minimum physical memory (RAM) required to run core processes normally when installing Oracle Database 19c?
cards.a: 8 GB minimum (Page 18)

cards.q: If physical memory is between 2 GB and 16 GB, how should virtual memory be set for Oracle Database 19c installation?
cards.a: Set virtual memory to 1 times the size of the RAM (Page 18)

cards.q: What type of Windows system architecture is required for installing Oracle Database 19c?
cards.a: Only available for 64 bit Windows systems (Workstation or Server) (Page 18)

cards.q: Which editions of Windows are supported for installing Oracle Database 19c?
cards.a: Windows 10 Professional, Enterprise and Education Editions (Page 18)

cards.q: Before beginning the installation of Oracle Database 18c, what must be verified regarding user access?
cards.a: We need to verify that we are connected to our Windows as an administration user. (الصفحة 20)

cards.q: When verifying hardware requirements for Oracle Database installation, what four items must be determined?
cards.a: The physical RAM size; the size of the configured virtual memory; the amount of free disk space on the system; and the amount of disk space available in the temp directory. (الصفحة 20)

cards.q: How is the required disk space for the temp directory calculated?
cards.a: It is equivalent to the total amount of free disk space, minus what is required for the Oracle software to be installed. (الصفحة 20)

cards.q: To begin the installation of the Oracle Database 19c, what steps must be taken?
cards.a: Go to the Oracle19c folder, locate the setup.exe file, run it, and choose "run as administrator." (الصفحة 20)

cards.q: What does choosing "Create and configure a single instance database" accomplish?
cards.a: It configures an Oracle Database Server on our machine and creates a starter database for learning and practice purposes (الصفحة 22)

cards.q: When should one choose the "Set Up Software Only" option during installation?
cards.a: When configuring a RAC or planning to perform an upgrade, as it only configures the Oracle Server software and no database will be created (الصفحة 22)

cards.q: If "Set Up Software Only" is chosen, what utility must be used to create the database manually?
cards.a: The DBCA utility (Database Configuration Assistant) (الصفحة 22)

cards.q: What are the two types of "System Class" options presented during installation?
cards.a: Desktop class and Server Class (الصفحة 24)

cards.q: What tool can be used to change connections or adjust aliases?
cards.a: The TNSnames editor (الصفحة 26)

cards.q: Which utility allows a user to view all objects of the current user/schema and other schema objects in one view?
cards.a: Schema Browser (الصفحة 26)

cards.q: What types of code can be written using tools like SQL Developer?
cards.a: The ability to write the SQL statement or PL/SQL statements, procedures, functions, etc. (الصفحة 27)

cards.q: Where can a user administer and monitor the connected database?
cards.a: By finding specific menu items (الصفحة 27)

cards.q: What does the Global Database Name do?
cards.a: It is the name that identifies the database (الصفحة 30)

cards.q: Why must a Global Database Name be unique?
cards.a: To distinguish the database from all other databases in a network (الصفحة 30)

cards.q: What is the Oracle System Identifier (SID)?
cards.a: The name of our database as well as serve as our database SID (الصفحة 30)

cards.q: By default, what is the Global Database Name set to?
cards.a: ORCL (الصفحة 30)

cards.q: Is Oracle Database 19c only available for Windows 10 Professional, Enterprise and Education editions?
cards.a: True (الصفحة 31)

cards.q: Is Oracle Database 19c only available for Windows 10 Home Edition?
cards.a: False (الصفحة 31)

cards.q: Which edition of Windows cannot install Oracle Database 19c?
cards.a: Windows 10 Home Edition (الصفحة 31)

cards.q: What is the purpose associated with the link https://localhost:5500/em?
cards.a: Oracle Database Configuration Assistant (الصفحة 31)
